basic_details.job_title: Sangeet Natak Akademi Guru/Teacher Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Sangeet Natak Akademi Recruitment 2026: Sangeet Natak Akademi is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 2 Guru/Teacher posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 40 years Maximum Age: 58 years Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Kathak Dance or Sitar, or equivalent, with teaching experience.
qualification.details: Guru/Teacher (Kathak Dance): Degree from a recognized University/ College in Kathak Dance or belonging to a traditional Dance Gharana family. Additional professional qualification in the Area of Dance. Minimum five years experience of teaching, performance and organizing activities related to performing arts. Desirable: Understanding and knowledge of performing arts as a performer/producer/researcher or field worker. Familiarity with computer application. Guru/Teacher (Sitar): Degree from a recognized University/ College in Sitar or B.High from AIR and belonging from traditional Gharana family. Additional professional qualification in the area of Music/Dance. Minimum five years experience of teaching, performance and organizing activities related to Performing arts. Desirable: Understanding and knowledge of performing arts as a performer/producer/researcher or field worker. Familiarity with computer application.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Sangeet Natak Akademi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 12 June 2026. Candidates should report at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Guru/Teacher post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Guru/Teacher post, with one each for Kathak Dance and Sitar.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Guru/Teacher (Kathak Dance) post?
faq.answer: A degree from a recognized University/College in Kathak Dance or belonging to a traditional Dance Gharana family is required, along with at least five years of teaching experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Guru/Teacher positions?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 40 years and the maximum age limit is 58 years for all posts.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Guru/Teacher posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 15,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 221001. The exact venue details will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these Guru/Teacher positions?
faq.answer: The job type is on a contract basis.
